impact:
BLOCKED BY ISS-009 — do not attempt until the V1L wet-path C10 LF deficit is fixed.

Original: V1L blend residual, +6dB at BL=0.65, attributed to NodalCircuit impedance loading, "not fixable by a scalar".

Why it is blocked (2026-07-16): this residual is measured against a V1L WET path that is -12.9dB LF-deficient (ISS-009, the flagged C10/R14 netlist gate). BLEND mixes dry against that broken wet path, so the blend residual currently measures wet-path breakage + any real blend error, inseparably. cascade_analysis.py section C shows the BL=0.65 "excess vs BL=1.00 baseline" is +9.7dB LF and +12.0dB cab-sim — i.e. adding dry partially CANCELS the wet path's LF deficit, which is exactly the two-errors-cancelling signature.

Additionally kOutputMakeup[1]=0.513 (and kDryGain[1]=2.534, derived from it) were fitted on the very capture carrying the deficit, so the blend's level reference will move when ISS-009 lands.

Re-measure after ISS-009 -> re-fit kOutputMakeup[1] -> re-derive kDryGain[1]. The residual may shrink substantially or change character; re-diagnose from scratch rather than assuming the impedance-loading explanation still holds.
title: V1L blend residual at partial BLEND settings
